# SEER Project Memory — auto-managed by SEER. Do not edit manually.

## 1. Project Overview
name: Pro Trend Website
goal: 4-page marketing website for Pro Trend, a digital marketing agency founded by Krithika T, featuring Home, Services, Pricing, and Contact pages
stack: TypeScript / Next.js 16 / Tailwind CSS 4 / App Router

## 2. Current Status
last_updated: 2026-04-08T12:07Z
phase: Post-deploy — polish
last_completed: Mobile responsiveness fixed, Sign in link removed, pushed to GitHub/Vercel
next_action: Final polish — favicon, meta tags, custom domain setup

## 3. Architecture Decisions
- 4-page website: Home, Services, Pricing/Packages, Contact/About
- Clean white SaaS-style UI with purple-to-teal gradient accents (from logo)
- Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
- 4 pricing tiers: Gold (₹25K), Silver (₹60K), Diamond (₹75K), Platinum (₹1.2L)
- Lead generation via WhatsApp links, contact form, and free consultation CTAs
